case_title: JAMIE HOWARD et al VS. THE WEDDING EXPERIENCE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,498.24 FILED BY HOWARD, JAMIE LEVOY, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT THE WEDDING EXPERIENCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE FILED BY DEFENDANT THE WEDDING EXPERIENCE
ORDER ON REQUEST FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, NO PROOF OF SERVICE, DEFENDANT APPEARS BY PHONE STAND-BY, COMM PAUL SLAVIT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOWARD, JAMIE LEVOY, DAVID
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-25-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-20-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THE WEDDING EXPERIENCE
ORIGNINAL OF FAXED REQUEST FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE RECEIVED.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-25-2009 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APR-03-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO DISMISS BASED ON IMPROPER VENUE IS DENIED; IN SMALL CLAIMS COURT, CONTRACTS SELECTING JUDICIAL FORUM ARE NOT ACCEPTABLE( CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 116.225). DEFENDANT MAY APPEAR BY TELEPHONE ON REQUEST, AND SHALL SUBMIT ANY DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE IN ADVANCE OF THE HEARING. PLAINTIFF PRESENT IN COURT. DEFENDANT APPEARS BY TELEPHONE. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY HOWARD, JAMIE LEVOY, DAVID

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-03-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-03-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. PLAINTIFF PRESENT IN COURT. DEFENDANT APPEARS BY TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT VERBALLY STIPULATES TO HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM. EXHIBITS RETAINED. COURT ACCEPTS PROOF OF SERVICE. CLERK: S.VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-03-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOWARD, JAMIE LEVOY, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE WEDDING EXPERIENCE $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,060.00, THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT: (1) BREACHED ITS CONTRACT TO PLAINTIFFS; (2) NEGLIGENTLY PROVIDED SERVICES TO PLAINTIF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT THE WEDDING EXPERIENCE
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
